# Gdscript Execution

> GDScript compilation, execution, and debugging

**Category:** Workflow · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** workflow · godot

## What this does

GDScript compilation, execution, and debugging

Specifies 4 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## What must be true

- **implementation:** Feature implemented in C++ engine core
- **platform_agnostic:** Works across desktop, web, mobile platforms

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Script Compilation** — when Compile .gd to bytecode is requested, then Compile .gd to bytecode completed.
- **Script Instance** — when Create object from script is requested, then Create object from script completed.
- **Hot Reload** — when Update running scripts is requested, then Update running scripts completed.
- **Error Reporting** — when Compile and runtime errors is requested, then Compile and runtime errors completed.
